investigate_well.name: Investigate the Well
investigate_well.summary: Enter Upper Catacombs to find why the well runs black
investigate_well.description: The well of Caer Vorn runs black and the town fears the worst. Warden Hella asks you to enter the Upper Catacombs, clear the roaming husks, and discover the source of the broken ward below.
objectives: Speak with Warden Hella in Caer Vorn.
Enter the Upper Catacombs and defeat roaming husks.
Reach the flooded junction and find the broken wardstone.

recover_sealed_page.name: Recover the Sealed Page
recover_sealed_page.summary: Retrieve the page from Sunken Library to learn the seal
recover_sealed_page.description: Warden Hella believes the seal to the lower ruins is written on a page lost in the Sunken Library. Descend past the catacombs, defeat the cursed scholar guarding it, and bring the page back.
objectives: Defeat the Cursed Scholar and recover the Sealed Page.
Return the page to Warden Hella.

end_the_cultist.name: End the Cultist
end_the_cultist.summary: Descend to Hollow Sanctum and stop the Parasite Cultist
end_the_cultist.description: The Parasite Cultist feeds on Caer Vorn's memory and spreads decay. With the seal known, cross the Bone Gallery and confront the cultist in the Hollow Sanctum to end the rot.
objectives: Cross the Bone Gallery and avoid collapsing floors.
Defeat the Parasite Cultist and seal the sanctum.
